AllZones: does anyone else feel like the named mobs in this game remember you
what's everyone's favorite zone so far
whats the best cheap upgrade at my level, asking for me
anyone else actually read the lore books? this continent has SEEN things

imagine explaining this place to someone from merosavilla
day 400 of pretending i know where im going
my inventory is full again. every time
five more minutes then i log. i said that an hour ago

the sunsets in this game are absurd
which god do you actually pray to. real answers only
count the vitheo statues you pass today. more than you think

Lines: port azure needs a bakery
meet at the docks if you're bored
half this town is just people standing at the auction house
the lost cellar is RIGHT next to the gate and we all just walk past it
the guard hangs people at dawn and the market opens right after. this city is a lot
everyone's first steps happen right here. no pressure
if you're new: welcome, loot everything
treven pines got me into fishing and now i own nothing but poles
the view from the ridge never gets old
the giant runts around here have a personal vendetta i swear
watch the priel recruits on the roads, they jump people
wiggleribs is the best worst name in all of erenshor
cagnus marlsen will beat you at chess AND take your lunch money
the ogre hunters drop solid starter bows, go shopping
took me forever to find this place. hidden hills indeed
quietest hills on the server. love it here
the necromancer business around here goes deeper than it looks
the frog men by the water are friend shaped. they are not friends
the fireflies here are so cool at night
i swear the faeries whisper if you stand still long enough
tinkles is up by the ruins again. someone avenge paul
if the raider is out, stay off the road and let someone tanky go first
the fernalla golem trains to the zone line if you let it. dont let it
valrae might be the best quest giver on the continent, ogrespice and all
whoever vitheo was, he picked a good spot for a watchtower
decent xp here if you keep moving
the molorai lock all their good stuff in krakengard. go take it
old brackey by the water hits way harder than he looks
the well water is fine. the flask quest says otherwise
these fields go on forever and i love it
underspine is around here somewhere if you're feeling brave
the revival plains earn the name. everything out here comes back
fernalla's children still tend this place. be respectful
the dying wish questline by the sepulcher actually made me sad
you can see the great willow from almost anywhere out here
is the sepulcher worth running at my level?
best picnic spot in erenshor, fight me
respawns are so fast the mobs beat you back from your corpse
anyone else just lie down in the grass here sometimes?
first dungeon energy in here. everyone dies at least once
watch the named ones in here, they hit way above their level
the necromancers down here answer to somebody. nobody agrees who
zashlyn bloodbane is farmable if you bring actual friends
i saw the apparition of sivakaya once. once was enough
skeleton captains hit way harder than the soldiers, pull careful
who keeps lighting all the candles down here
the rituals in here are probably fine. probably
does anything down here drop gear or is it all bones?
the pits are exactly as dark as advertised
the light here really is something at dusk
level range in this place is wild, watch what you pull
that skull on the horizon is the jaws of sivakaya. we LIVE here
the arcane pupils still practice like the school never fell
collect the school pages if you see them. trust me
a fortress named after a kraken. what could go wrong
stick together in here, it punishes solo heroes
the molorai run this place like a prison. jailors and everything
captain sigrid walks rounds with a bodyguard. thats how you find her
the brewmistress drops are worth the whole trip
overseer orlok is rare. saw him once. still bragging
the chef and the brewmistress run the kitchens like nothing is wrong
the attack dogs hear you long before you see them
whats locked in the deepest cell? and why does nobody go check
molorai veterans fight like they remember a real war
blacksalt beach day! bring a weapon
the salt gets in everything. worth it for the coastline
goliath walks this strand like he pays taxes here
the sivakayan clergy on this beach are NOT here to swim
the windmill is the best landmark on the coast. meet there
someone should give brice and cyndreela a proper burial already

smells exactly like you'd think out here
the swamp wyrm is real, and the rumor says it has a sibling
ragewhip gets angrier the longer you fight him. plan around that
watch for poachers around the nipper pups. actual villains
you can slip into the mines from here if you know the back way
if you're under 11 in here, that's a bold choice
it's darker down here than the map suggests

druo the reborn is always home. the other bosses rotate

smells like wet cave and regret down here
the shamans cast. the bruisers do not need to

pretty zone, mean residents
